_comment: Ventrata test supplier (EdinExplore). No signup needed for sandbox.
_instructions: Get your test API key from https://docs.ventrata.com/getting-started/getting-started — set it as VENTRATA_API_KEY in .env. Production approval takes 1-2 business days after emailing connectivity@ventrata.com.
name: Edinburgh Explorer (Ventrata Test)

_comment: Zaui — self-serve signup, API key returned immediately. Free OCTO access. Test sandbox at suppliertestsystem.zaui.net.
_instructions: Sign up at api.zaui.io/signup — automated, no approval needed. Set ZAUI_API_KEY in .env.
name: Zaui (Test)

_comment: Bokun — $49/month START plan, self-serve API keys via dashboard. 1.5% booking fee.
_instructions: Sign up at bokun.io, select Reseller role, generate API key under Settings > Connections > API Keys. Email support for demo environment. Set BOKUN_API_KEY in .env.
name: Bokun Reseller

_comment: Rezdy Agent API — free account, API key in 48 hours, staging at rezdy-staging.com.
_instructions: Create free account at rezdy.com (select Reseller). Request API key via Integrations menu. Staging: api.rezdy-staging.com. Set REZDY_API_KEY in .env. Note: Rezdy uses its own API format (not OCTO) — handled by fetch_rezdy_slots.py.
name: Rezdy Agent

_comment: Xola — free sandbox at sandbox.xola.com. Register at developers.xola.com.
_instructions: Register developer account, create a Distribution Channel app in App Store Console. Email Xola to schedule kick-off call for production. Set XOLA_API_KEY in .env.
name: Xola Distribution

_comment: Peek Pro OCTO — contact ben.smithart@peek.com. Test key provided same day.
_instructions: Email ben.smithart@peek.com — responds quickly with a test key. Base URL is https://octo.peek.com/integrations/octo (NOT api.peek.com/octo). Set PEEK_API_KEY in .env.
name: Peek Pro (Test)

_comment: FareHarbor FHDN Affiliate — email channelsupport@fareharbor.com. Referral links only until $250k TTM.
_instructions: Email channelsupport@fareharbor.com with company name, website, commission preference. API access requires $250k TTM on affiliate dashboard first. Set FAREHARBOR_API_KEY in .env when approved.
name: FareHarbor
